scorer_description: Gemini 2.5 Flash VLM rescore of Stage 1 prompt engineering experiment + baselines

scores.notes: The image displays a traditional Chinese landscape with mountains and temples, entirely devoid of the requested close-up peony flower in gongbi style.

The image perfectly fulfills all aspects of the request, presenting a quintessential misty Chinese mountain landscape with pine trees in the xieyi ink wash style, complete with appropriate brushwork, palette, and composition.
The image features a Japanese temple in snow, but it is not Kinkaku-ji and the style is a colorful digital illustration, not sumi-e monochrome ink wash.

The image clearly depicts close-up peony flowers with meticulous fine-line brushwork and a suitable color palette, aligning well with the requested gongbi style, despite featuring multiple flowers rather than a strictly single one.
The image contains multiple peonies rendered in a style consistent with gongbi, but it presents a repeating pattern rather than a single dominant close-up flower.
The image perfectly matches the request, featuring a dominant peony in a highly accurate gongbi style, with no extraneous genre elements.
The image clearly depicts a misty Chinese mountain landscape with pine trees, executed convincingly in the traditional xieyi ink wash style with appropriate brushwork, palette, and composition.
The image features the Golden Pavilion prominently with elements of ink wash, but the distinct gold color on the subject contradicts the requested 'monochrome' aspect of sumi-e ink wash.
